// 01 — selected work

Owned end-to-end, from research to ship.

Two multi-platform products where I led the full UX/UI — flows, systems, dashboards, and hand-off.

Food-tech · End-to-end

Yogra

Smart hotel dining & food community platform

  • Waiter-less ordering system that cuts staff dependency and speeds up service
  • Real-time order tracking: Accepted → In Progress → Completed
  • Kitchen dashboard for order acceptance and rejection
  • Manager app for menus, QR generation, billing, and tables
  • Social foodie layer — posts, tipping, reviews, and an auction system
Service ecosystem · Multi-platform

Iyyan

Tech support service ecosystem — mobile + web

  • Connected users, engineers, and service centers in one ecosystem
  • User app for service requests and real-time engineer chat
  • Admin dashboard for bookings, allocation, and service lifecycle
  • Service-center platform for job tracking and operational visibility
  • Streamlined the full journey: request → allocation → completion

// 03 — experience

Where I've designed.

Mar 2024 — Present
Samco Securities Ltd

Junior UI/UX Designer

  • Contributed to the launch of Samco 3.0, designing scalable trading experiences for live users
  • Designed core trading flows and UI systems in Figma to simplify complex financial actions
  • Enhanced Samco Prime for better feature discoverability and engagement
  • Designed the US Stocks trading flow with consistent cross-platform experience
  • Ran usability testing and iterative improvements; partnered with devs through walkthroughs and standups
Jun 2022 — Mar 2024
Ritzy Technewell Solutions

UI/UX Designer & Graphic Designer

  • Led end-to-end UX/UI for multiple client projects across web and mobile
  • Translated complex requirements into intuitive flows and interfaces
  • Built wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity UI in Figma and Adobe XD
  • Improved usability by spotting friction points through testing and iteration
  • Delivered branding, marketing creatives, and visual assets
May 2019 — Nov 2019
Infact-E (Crotser Consultancy)

Spoken English Trainer

  • Delivered structured training with visual and interactive learning methods
  • Built communication skills through content creation and presentations
  • Developed storytelling abilities now applied directly to UX design
